original_snippet_context: Discussion of a budget amendment related to funding the promotion of national products abroad, including coffee.
relevant_quote: Calculado o valor do ouro ao cambio do 13 d., que a caixa de conversão pretende firmar, esses quatro mil contos valerão, em papel moeda, sete mil e duzentos contos de réis.
justification: This part simply mentions the proposed exchange rate of 13d that the Caixa de Conversão aims to establish, using it as a basis for calculating the value of funds allocated for product promotion. It doesn't express an opinion on the rate itself.
